mapper.sql: id, group_no, order_type, customer_no, user_no, model_no, quantity, org_price, org_currency, price, dept_no, order_date, remark, dlv_date, corder_no, product_name, status, dlvType, trade_companyId, order_no, order_item, full_order_no, create_time, update_time, update_user, create_user, cproduct_no, export_type, receiver_address, receiver_phone, receiver_name, receiver_company, export_warehouse, complaint_no, eprice, dlv_entire, province, city, district
mapper.select:
select
distinct
from dbo.spec_order
order by ${orderByClause}
mapper.insert: insert into dbo.spec_order (id, group_no, order_type, customer_no, user_no, model_no, quantity, org_price, org_currency, price, dept_no, order_date, remark, dlv_date, corder_no, product_name, status, dlvType, trade_companyId, order_no, order_item, full_order_no, create_time, update_time, update_user, create_user, cproduct_no, export_type, receiver_address, receiver_phone, receiver_name, receiver_company, export_warehouse, complaint_no, eprice, dlv_entire, province, city, district ) values (#{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{groupNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{orderType,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{customerNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{userNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{modelNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{quantity,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{orgPrice,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{orgCurrency,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{price,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{deptNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{orderDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{remark,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, #{dlvDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{corderNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{productName,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, #{status,jdbcType=SMALLINT}, #{dlvtype,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{tradeCompanyid,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{orderNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{orderItem,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{fullOrderNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{updateUser,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{createUser,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{cproductNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{exportType,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{receiverAddress,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, #{receiverPhone,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, #{receiverName,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, #{receiverCompany,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, #{exportWarehouse,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, #{complaintNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{eprice,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{dlvEntire,jdbcType=CHAR}, #{province,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{city,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{district,jdbcType=VARCHAR} )

update dbo.spec_order
id = #{record.id,jdbcType=BIGINT},
group_no = #{record.groupNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
order_type = #{record.orderType,jdbcType=INTEGER},
customer_no = #{record.customerNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
user_no = #{record.userNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR},

quantity = #{record.quantity,jdbcType=INTEGER},

order_date = #{record.orderDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
remark = #{record.remark,jdbcType=NVARCHAR},

update_time = #{record.updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
update_user = #{record.updateUser,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
create_user = #{record.createUser,jdbcType=VARCHAR},

export_type = #{record.exportType,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
receiver_address = #{record.receiverAddress,jdbcType=NVARCHAR},
receiver_phone = #{record.receiverPhone,jdbcType=NVARCHAR},
receiver_name = #{record.receiverName,jdbcType=NVARCHAR},
receiver_company = #{record.receiverCompany,jdbcType=NVARCHAR},

province = #{record.province,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
city = #{record.city,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
district = #{record.district,jdbcType=VARCHAR},

update dbo.spec_order
group_no = #{groupNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
order_type = #{orderType,jdbcType=INTEGER},
customer_no = #{customerNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
user_no = #{userNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
model_no = #{modelNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
quantity = #{quantity,jdbcType=INTEGER},
org_price = #{orgPrice,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
org_currency = #{orgCurrency,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
price = #{price,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
dept_no = #{deptNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
order_date = #{orderDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
remark = #{remark,jdbcType=NVARCHAR},
dlv_date = #{dlvDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
corder_no = #{corderNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
product_name = #{productName,jdbcType=NVARCHAR},
status = #{status,jdbcType=SMALLINT},
dlvType = #{dlvtype,jdbcType=VARCHAR},

order_no = #{orderNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
order_item = #{orderItem,jdbcType=INTEGER},

receiver_address = #{receiverAddress,jdbcType=NVARCHAR},
receiver_phone = #{receiverPhone,jdbcType=NVARCHAR},
receiver_name = #{receiverName,jdbcType=NVARCHAR},
receiver_company = #{receiverCompany,jdbcType=NVARCHAR},
export_warehouse = #{exportWarehouse,jdbcType=NVARCHAR},
complaint_no = #{complaintNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
eprice = #{eprice,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
dlv_entire = #{dlvEntire,jdbcType=CHAR},
province = #{province,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
city = #{city,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
district = #{district,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
where id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}
